title: brassica oleracea var. major
intro: Brassica oleracea var. major, commonly known as kai lan or Chinese broccoli, is a variety of the Brassica oleracea plant, which belongs to the mustard or cabbage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of kai lan include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and support bone health. In herbal preparations, kai lan is often used as a tea or added to soups and stir-fries, where its leaves and stems can be harvested and used fresh or dried for later use.
